name: etiopique-lorem-texts

metadata.summary: A simple Lorem Ipsum generator for Amharic and English.

documentation:
# etiopique_lorem_texts
# Lorem Ipsum Generator (Amharic and English)

A simple Python package to generate Lorem Ipsum text in both English and Amharic languages.

## Installation

```bash
pip install etiopique-lorem-texts

functions.name: etiopique_lorem_texts.main.load_words
documentation: Loads words from a file, splitting by spaces.

functions.name: etiopique_lorem_texts.main.generate_lorem_ipsum
documentation: Generates a lorem ipsum string using the given words.
